title: Planet Labs PBC (PL) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text:
TipRanks provides analyst price forecast data for Planet Labs PBC showing consensus Strong Buy rating from analysts. Analyst consensus reflects confidence in the company's growth trajectory, profitability achievement, and defense market dynamics. Strong Buy consensus indicates analysts expect meaningful upside from current stock prices.

Analyst price target consensus averages $35.00, with high forecast of $40.00 and low forecast of $20.00. The wide range reflects varying assumptions about the company's ability to execute on backlog conversion and satellite deployment. Recent analyst activity includes Wedbush raising its price target to $50 from $40, and Cantor Fitzgerald raising its price target to $40 from $20.

Planet Labs' fiscal 2026 results support analyst optimism. Revenue of $307.7 million (26% growth) and achievement of profitability with $15.5 million adjusted EBITDA validate the business model. The $900 million backlog, growing 79% year-over-year, provides substantial revenue visibility. Defense & Intelligence segment growth exceeding 50% year-over-year demonstrates accelerating demand.

Key positive catalysts include quarterly earnings beats (the company beat Q4 expectations by 11.55%), major contract announcements, and successful satellite launches. Recent contracts with Sweden, Germany, Greece, and other nations provide positive momentum. The NVIDIA partnership announcement in March 2026 drove analyst enthusiasm for in-orbit AI capabilities.

Analyst research emphasizes the company's transition from venture-stage pre-profitability company to profitable growth company. Fiscal 2027 guidance of $415-440 million revenue (35-43% growth) reflects management confidence. The combination of backlog visibility, improving profitability, and strong demand from defense customers supports analyst expectations for continued stock appreciation.
